forecasts.reasoning: Anthropic has recently (Q1 2025) been engaged in securing massive private funding rounds, valuing the company at over $60 billion. Going public via an IPO requires months of preparation, traditionally preceded by hiring investment banks and rumors of a confidential S-1 draft. No such leaks or rumors exist as of May 15, 2025. Given that they are perfectly capable of raising tens of billions in private capital, there is no immediate pressure or strategic rationale to rapidly announce an IPO in the 1.5 months before July 1, 2025. Thus, the probability is extremely low.

SpaceX received its operational license for Somalia on April 13, 2025, and Elon Musk announced on X the same day that Starlink is "now available" in Somalia. Follow-up reports in early May 2025 confirm that users in Somalia can order kits and that "publicly available service maps" show the country as covered. When Starlink officially launches in a country and allows direct orders, the Starlink Availability Map updates to show the region as "Available." Given that the service has already launched and orders are active well before the July 1, 2025 cutoff, the probability that the map shows Somalia as "Available" is practically certain.
